question: Implement AliBi (Attention with Linear Biases). AliBi adds a position-dependent linear bias to attention scores. The bias for position i attending to position j at head h is: bias[i,j,h] = -|i-j| * slope[h], where slope[h] = 2^(-8 * (h+1) / n_heads). Note: slopes decrease geometrically from head 0 to head n_heads-1.
code_hint: Compute slopes using exponent formula. Create distance matrix |i-j| using torch.arange. Multiply by slopes with broadcasting.
